examples: You've got to get rid of the ritual impurity, so there'll have to be some ritual procedure that purges the impurity.
According to Klawans and others, ritual impurity arises from physical substances and states which are not in themselves sinful.
What are these sources of impurity?
Other minor contributions towards heating the putative refrigerator are the impurity of the superconductor and the resistance of the junction.
Even then, some level of impurity must be tolerable.
